lifecycle.reason: Qualified source candidate deferred behind the priority 30 because of overlap, missing support files, platform requirements, or lower Web readiness.

summary.original: Canonical rules and HTML/CSS contract for inline `[n]` citation references, end-of-document Citations blocks, and optional per-section citation recaps used across Moody's Agentic Solutions HTML report skills (earnings-brief, peer-analysis, issuer-brief, sector-brief, etc.). Parent skills must read BOTH this `SKILL.md` (rules, numbering, hyperlink behavior, source data shape) AND `assets/template.html` (canonical CSS block + literal HTML markup snippets) before emitting citations. The asset file is the single source of truth for the visual/markup implementation; this `SKILL.md` is the single source of truth for the authoring rules. Triggers when the user asks about citations, sources, references, footnotes, hyperlinking [n] markers, or the Sources/Citations block in any HTML report skill.

description.original: Canonical rules and HTML/CSS contract for inline `[n]` citation references, end-of-document Citations blocks, and optional per-section citation recaps used across Moody's Agentic Solutions HTML report skills (earnings-brief, peer-analysis, issuer-brief, sector-brief, etc.). Parent skills must read BOTH this `SKILL.md` (rules, numbering, hyperlink behavior, source data shape) AND `assets/template.html` (canonical CSS block + literal HTML markup snippets) before emitting citations. The asset file is the single source of truth for the visual/markup implementation; this `SKILL.md` is the single source of truth for the authoring rules. Triggers when the user asks about citations, sources, references, footnotes, hyperlinking [n] markers, or the Sources/Citations block in any HTML report skill. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 引用与脚注规范。Agent-OPT 将官方 SKILL.md 适配为独立 Web 技能工作室：支持章节导航、全文检索、中英对照元数据与只读源码呈现；不执行上游脚本，不访问外部账号。

description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

notes: In-process skill runtime reads only catalog/skill-bodies/<slug> files prepared at curation time.
